responsibilities: • create educational videos on finance and accounting topics   • explain concepts, exam preparation, and career guidance   • research trending finance topics and audience needs   • maintain content quality, accuracy, and compliance   • engage with audience through comments, live sessions, and q&a   • collaborate with edtech platforms, brands, and institutions
qualifications: • ca or strong finance expertise   • camera confidence and communication skills   • basic video production and digital marketing knowledge
